⊢ Submodule.span R
      (Set.range
        ⇑({ toFun := List.get RootPairing.EmbeddedG2.allCocoeffs, inj' := ⋯ }.trans
            { toFun := fun x => Int.cast ∘ x, inj' := ⋯ })) =

proof:
rw [eq_top_iff]
    intro x _
    obtain ⟨a, b, rfl⟩ : ∃ a b, x = ![a, b] := by exact ⟨x 0, x 1, by ext i; fin_cases i <;> rfl⟩
    refine mem_span_pair.mpr ⟨b, a, ?_⟩
    simp [← Fin.getElem_fin]
    ext i
    fin_cases i <;> simp [Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
